amended_definition_text: correspondence L2 (K=32 canonical arc-length resample path): D(X,G) = min over orientation flip of (1/L)·sqrt((1/K)·Σ_k ||X̃_k − G̃_k||²) using absolute coordinates; D_shape removes each centroid before the same computation; orientation flip evaluates k↔k and k↔K+1−k correspondences; gate PASS = Spearman rho(ΔD, Δ||c_g_anchor||) >= 0.9 AND Spearman rho(ΔD_shape, Δ||c_g_shape||) >= 0.9.

component_a.definition: Spearman rho(ΔD_corr absolute correspondence L2, Δ||c_g_anchor||)
component_a.name: primary_component_a_anchor

component_b.definition: Spearman rho(ΔD_shape centroid-removed fixed-orientation correspondence L2, Δ||c_g_shape|| under the M5R2 Case A orientation convention)
component_b.name: primary_component_b_shape_flip_consistent
component_b.orientation_convention: orientation canonicalization 규약 (2026-07-03 M5R2 Case A로 편입 — 버그 수정, 파라미터 변경 아님): per transition, choose exactly one flip decision against the goal using X_before, selecting the orientation that minimizes the mode-1..7 residual versus the goal's shape Phi; apply that fixed decision identically to X_before and X_after in both c_g_shape and D_shape computations for the shape component. Component (a) absolute D keeps the existing correspondence_l2 min-flip unchanged.

goal_sampling.random_stream: numpy.default_rng(seed); one template index and one anchor per transition

config_text:
dataset:
  h5: outputs/data/p0_random_transitions.h5
  dm_stats_json: outputs/metrics/dm_stats.json
filters:
  settle_max_steps: 5000
  primary: grasp_success AND settle_steps != settle_max_steps
  variants:
    all_success: grasp_success
    all_transitions: no filter
goal_sampling:
  anchor_mode: centroid
  templates: [straight, u_bend, s_curve]
  # Uniform anchor box in rope-length units.  Each transition samples
  # low * length_m <= anchor <= high * length_m in world coordinates.
  anchor_box_unit_length:
    low: [-1.25, -1.25, 0.02]
    high: [1.25, 1.25, 0.18]
  random_stream: numpy.default_rng(seed); one template index and one anchor per transition
quantitative:
  threshold_rho: 0.9
  minimum_primary_n: 1000
qualitative:
  lengths_m: [0.5, 1.0, 1.6]
  initial_seed: 20260703
  anchor_mode: centroid
  anchor: [0.0, 0.0, 0.04]
  boundary_radius_fraction_of_length: 0.05
outputs:
  metrics_json: outputs/metrics/g2_correlation.json
  scatter_png: outputs/plots/g2_scatter.png
  plots_dir: outputs/plots
  stdout_log: outputs/reports/gate_g2_stdout.log

criteria.B: D1 rho < 0.9 AND D2 sanity rho >= 0.99 AND rho_trunc < 0.9

case_suggestion.reason: D1 flip-consistent rho is at or above 0.9.

definitions.D1: Fixed orientation per transition: choose flip of X_before minimizing mode-1..7 residual to goal Phi, then apply same flip to X_before/X_after for c_g_shape and centroid-removed D_shape_full.
definitions.D2: D_shape_lowpass is centroid-removed correspondence RMS between inverse-DCT reconstructions retaining modes 1..7 under the same fixed flip convention.
definitions.tail_energy: Tail fraction is ||DCT modes >=8 residual||^2 / ||DCT modes >=1 residual||^2 with orthonormal DCT-II coefficients.

12.orientation_convention: D1 fixed flip chosen from before curve modes 1..7

16.orientation_convention: D1 fixed flip chosen from before curve modes 1..7

per_channel_residual_contribution_summar.basis: orthonormal DCT-II coefficients of centroid-removed fixed-orientation residuals; modes 1..31 only

sampling_spec.anchor_sampling: uniform per axis; sampled_anchor = uniform(low, high) * transition.length_m
sampling_spec.goal_per_transition: one independently sampled template index and anchor per transition

methodology.component_a: Unchanged v2 Spearman rho(ΔD_corr, Δ||c_g_anchor||) on primary population
methodology.component_b: M5R2 Case A fixed-orientation Spearman rho(ΔD_shape, Δ||c_g_shape||)
methodology.delta_D_corr: Absolute correspondence_l2 after-before; existing min-flip behavior unchanged
methodology.delta_D_shape: Centroid-removed RMS after-before under one X_before-selected flip per transition
methodology.delta_c_g_shape_norm: Mode-1..7 DCT residual norm after-before under the same fixed flip
methodology.physics_quality_note: For gate/human review, prefer rates.success_and_converged (0.484) over the headline settle_converged rate: failed grasps are no-op transitions whose converged flag reflects the untouched rope, so the aggregate conflates populations. Settle non-convergence at the immutable 1e-3/5000 budget affects 2341 successful transitions; they are recorded honestly (settle_steps == max_steps) and excluded from the normalizer fit. Flagged for the M5/M6 human gates (plan A1).

orientation_convention: orientation canonicalization 규약 (2026-07-03 M5R2 Case A로 편입 — 버그 수정, 파라미터 변경 아님): per transition, choose exactly one flip decision against the goal using X_before, selecting the orientation that minimizes the mode-1..7 residual versus the goal's shape Phi; apply that fixed decision identically to X_before and X_after in both c_g_shape and D_shape computations for the shape component. Component (a) absolute D keeps the existing correspondence_l2 min-flip unchanged.

component_a.definition: Spearman rho(ΔD_corr absolute correspondence L2, Δ||c_g_anchor||)
component_a.name: all_success_component_a_anchor

component_b.definition: Spearman rho(ΔD_shape centroid-removed fixed-orientation correspondence L2, Δ||c_g_shape|| under the M5R2 Case A orientation convention)
component_b.name: all_success_component_b_shape_flip_consistent
component_b.orientation_convention: orientation canonicalization 규약 (2026-07-03 M5R2 Case A로 편입 — 버그 수정, 파라미터 변경 아님): per transition, choose exactly one flip decision against the goal using X_before, selecting the orientation that minimizes the mode-1..7 residual versus the goal's shape Phi; apply that fixed decision identically to X_before and X_after in both c_g_shape and D_shape computations for the shape component. Component (a) absolute D keeps the existing correspondence_l2 min-flip unchanged.

component_a.definition: Spearman rho(ΔD_corr absolute correspondence L2, Δ||c_g_anchor||)
component_a.name: all_transitions_component_a_anchor

component_b.definition: Spearman rho(ΔD_shape centroid-removed fixed-orientation correspondence L2, Δ||c_g_shape|| under the M5R2 Case A orientation convention)
component_b.name: all_transitions_component_b_shape_flip_consistent
component_b.orientation_convention: orientation canonicalization 규약 (2026-07-03 M5R2 Case A로 편입 — 버그 수정, 파라미터 변경 아님): per transition, choose exactly one flip decision against the goal using X_before, selecting the orientation that minimizes the mode-1..7 residual versus the goal's shape Phi; apply that fixed decision identically to X_before and X_after in both c_g_shape and D_shape computations for the shape component. Component (a) absolute D keeps the existing correspondence_l2 min-flip unchanged.
